description: Two bind:value text inputs (§5.4). Typing into each input syncs its own cell; #full interpolates both. A literal separator keeps the whole-tree dom faithful (the inter-interpolation space otherwise collapses).
rationale: §5.4 each bind:value input syncs its cell independently on input; the shared interpolation re-renders from both. Grace / Hopper.

expect.dom: Grace / Hopper
